summary: High‑quality master audience cassette capture, though musical performance details are not discussed.
review: The sole review identifies this tape as a Master Audience Cassette (MAC) transferred from first‑generation cassettes by Mark McCue, indicating a relatively clean audience source. No comments are made about the band's playing or specific moments, so the show quality cannot be assessed from the available feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewer gave a perfect rating based on the source quality; however, with only one brief comment and no musical assessment, confidence in an overall rating is limited.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Identified as Master Audience Cassette (MAC) transferred from first‑gen cassettes via Mark McCue; suggests a well‑preserved audience recording with typical tape characteristics.
